A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
The agent selected all files whose paths matched '%README.md' (including subdirectory READMEs) from contents (query_db:26) and computed counts (execute_python:28), rather than restricting to each repository’s root README.md, leading to inflated totals and an incorrect proportion.

The agent computed the proportion across all README.md files anywhere in repositories (querying contents with sample_path = 'README.md' OR sample_path LIKE '%/README.md') rather than restricting to each repository’s top-level README.md (i.e., one per repo), causing inflated counts and an incorrect proportion.

A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
By querying contents with sample_path LIKE '%README.md' (query_db:12) and then counting those in execute_python:18, the agent included nested README files instead of only root-level README.md files, inflating the count (136 vs the ground-truth 3) and yielding an incorrect proportion.
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: no
FM3: yes
FM4: no
@@
